SEARCH
Package com.govsim.govsim.gui

Class DashboardController

java.lang.Object
com.govsim.govsim.gui.DashboardController
All Implemented Interfaces:
SimuEngineGUI.SimulationListener
public class DashboardController extends Object implements SimuEngineGUI.SimulationListener
DashboardController — main game controller. Manages the simulation timer, UI updates, sidebars, and popups.
